channel.title: WI on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in WI on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 287(g) JEM: Kenosha County Sheriff’s Office (WI)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Kenosha County Sheriff’s Office.

Model: JEM Signed: January 7, 2026 County: Kenosha County State: WI FIPS: 55059

Source: Prison Policy Initiative appendix table, compiled from ICE data as of Feb 17, 2026.

item.title: Dodge Corr Institute, Wau — Dodge, WI
